channel.title: gitlabci on Edson Celio
channel.description: Recent content in gitlabci on Edson Celio

item.title: Day 01 - Deploying an App from Gitlab to Heroku
item.description: Problem Deploy an application hosted in Gitlab to Heroku, using Gitlab CI/CD. Solution Configurating Heroku account Heroku is a PaaS with support to several programmming languages.

item.title: Day 01 - Deploying an App from Gitlab to Heroku
item.description: Problem Deploy an application hosted in Gitlab to Heroku, using Gitlab CI/CD. Solution Configurating Heroku account Heroku is a PaaS with support to several programmming languages.
